subject: docs: add permanent note to never use AskUserQuestion tool
body:
The interactive input selection UI breaks the session — covers context,
gets stuck awaiting input, blocks workflow. Added to both AI Notes
(CLAUDE.md) and AI_MISTAKES.md so every future session sees it.

Tags: documentation, ai-notes, ux
Complexity: 1
Urgency: 5
Impact: internal
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: codebase-review
Semver: patch

https://claude.ai/code/session_01QmaxsMJta25nBMqgusP7x1
title: add permanent note to never use AskUserQuestion tool
